description_long: This elderly person is depicted as a robust male figure with a muscular build, light skin, and a prominent white beard and mustache. He wears a sleeveless tunic with a brown leather-like belt and shoulder strap, blue pants, and brown boots, giving him a rugged, almost warrior-like appearance. His left shoulder is protected by a gold-toned pauldron, and both wrists are adorned with black bracers. The hair is styled in a long, white mohawk braid that extends down his back. His facial features are strong and defined, with a stern expression and bushy eyebrows. The overall attire and accessories suggest a character who is both aged and physically capable, possibly a retired fighter or guardian.
description: A muscular elderly man with a white braided mohawk, full beard, and rugged attire including a sleeveless tunic, blue pants, boots, and leather accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full beard, stern face, sleeveless tunic, blue pants, and brown boots, with the shoulder strap and pauldron clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length of the mohawk braid, the shoulder pauldron, and the layered belt and bracers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the long braided mohawk, broad back, brown belt, and the back of the boots and tunic.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the arm bracer, and the details of the tunic and boots, with the shoulder strap crossing the chest.
attribute_clothing_style: Rugged, sleeveless tunic with a wide brown belt, blue pants, brown boots, black wrist bracers, and a gold-toned shoulder pauldron; accessorized with a cross-body strap.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms relaxed at sides.
attribute_hairstyle: Long white mohawk braid with shaved sides.
attribute_facial_features: Full white beard and mustache, bushy eyebrows, strong jawline, and a stern expression.
